display.name: Clickhouse Overview
display.description: This dashboard provides a high-level overview of your Clickhouse Server hosts.

spec.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'host.name') AS `host.name`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'ClickHouseMetrics_VersionInteger' and __normalized=false 
GROUP BY `host.name`

display.name: Total Time spent for Background Merges
Rejected Writes
display.description: Writes rejected with "Too many parts" for inserts or "Too many mutations" for mutations
